title: Invoice clarification for February subscription
description: Customer asked for a breakdown of line items on invoice INV-2042 before payment. Clarification provided and resolved.

title: Billing Dispute for Transaction TX-5001
description: Customer disputes a charge of $150.00 on transaction TX-5001. They claim the charge is for a service they did not authorize and that the amount does not match their records. Please review the ledger transaction TX-5001 and verify the charge.

title: Unable to access premium features after upgrade
description: Customer upgraded to the professional plan but cannot access advanced reporting features. Login credentials valid; escalation to engineering may be required.

title: Update billing contact address
description: Customer requests to change the primary billing address on file from 123 Main St to 456 Oak Ave. Documentation attached.
